message:
feat(cli): add ms personalize command for skill adaptation

Add new CLI command to personalize skills based on user coding style:
- ms personalize skill <id> - adapt skill to user style
- ms personalize extract - extract style from CASS sessions
- ms personalize show - display current style profile

Style extraction analyzes code blocks from CASS sessions to detect:
- Naming conventions (snake_case vs camelCase)
- Code patterns (early returns, guard clauses, method chaining)
- Comment style (doc comments, TODO markers)

Includes robot mode support and 6 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
